title: FUGUEオーケストレーションについて、Orchestratorはどうなっているか調べて
summary_text:
```mermaid flowchart TD A[GitHub Issue
ラベル: fugue-task,tutti] --> B[fugue-tutti-caller.yml] A2[workflow_dispatch] --> B B --> B1[ctx
Issue解析・翻訳ゲート・リスク推定] B1 --> B2{subscription strictで実行可能か} B2 -- いいえ --> B3[Issueへpauseコメント
processing解除] B2 -- はい --> C[fugue-tutti-router.yml
(再利用workflow)] C --> C1[prepare
信頼判定・runner在否判定] C1 --> C2[resolve-orchestrator
main/assist解決・lane行列生成] C2 --> D{execution_profile} D -- subscription-paused --> D1[pause-subscription
安全停止] D -- subscription-strict --> E[run-agents] D -- api-continuity/api-standard --> E E --> E1{実行runner} E1 -- strict --> E2[self-hosted + 必須ラベル
FUGUE_SUBSCRIPTION_RUNNER_LABEL] E1 -- continuity/api --> E3[ubuntu-latest] C2 --> Q[subscription-queue-guard
停滞/未展開lane監視] Q -->|異常検知| Q1[Issueへpauseコメント
run cancel] E --> F[integrate
重み付き2/3合議 + HIGHリスク拒否] F --> G[finalize
completed / needs-review / needs-human] H[fugue-orchestrator-canary.yml] --> C I[fugue-status.yml] --> J[運用状態レポート投稿] ``` ```mermaid stateDiagram-v2 [*] --> SubscriptionStrict: engine=subscription かつ 必須ラベルrunner online [*] --> SubscriptionPaused: engine=subscription かつ offline_policy=hold かつ runner offline [*] --> ApiContinuity: engine=subscription かつ offline_policy=continuity [*] --> ApiStandard: engine=api/harness SubscriptionStrict --> QueueGuardPause: run-agents停滞/未展開 QueueGuardPause --> SubscriptionPaused: pauseコメント + cancel SubscriptionStrict --> Integrated ApiContinuity --> Integrated ApiStandard --> Integrated SubscriptionPaused --> [*] Integrated --> Finalized Finalized --> [*] ``` 必要ならこの図を `docs/architecture-ja.md` として保存しておきます。
